mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_NO FROM BOARD WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} ORDER BY BOARD_NO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT b.BOARD_NO , c.CATEGORY_NAME , m.MEMBER_NAME , b.BOARD_TITLE , b.BOARD_CONTENT , b.COUNT , b.CREATE_DATE , b.DEL_YN FROM BOARD b JOIN CATEGORY c USING(CATEGORY_NO) JOIN MEMBER m USING(MEMBER_NO) WHERE b.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY b.BOARD_NO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT B.BOARD_NO , B.BOARD_TITLE , B.BOARD_CONTENT , B.COUNT , C.CATEGORY_NAME , M.MEMBER_ID FROM BOARD B Join Category C USING(CATEGORY_NO) Join MEMBER M USING(MEMBER_NO) WHERE B.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND B.DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BOARD WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS EXISTS_YN FROM DUAL
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET COUNT = COUNT + 1 WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
UPDATE BOARD SET DEL_YN = 'Y' WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
